text:
is a student who comes to watch the Attack Junior High School play.

Appearance

She has messy red hair tied in two short pigtails and big teal eyes. Isabel wears her school sailor uniform which consists of a yellow and blue sailor collar.

Story

Isabel watches the Attack Junior High School play with Furlan Church.

Relationships

Furlan Church - The two appear to be friends to an unknown extent.
